budget_constraint.scope: one deduplicated full IEEE123 physical upgrade portfolio

budget_derivation.derivation: Minimum feasible islanding portfolio plus the least-cost full PV option in the discrete catalog.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

budget_encoding.rounding_guarantee: asset costs are rounded upward and the budget downward; encoded feasibility cannot permit a real-dollar overrun

budget_penalty_certificate.bound_method: sum of absolute non-budget coefficients; every binary monomial lies in [0,1]
